reviews.review_description: Been playing this game for a while and love it! Can you please give us the option to turn the music off in our lobby? There’s one song that makes me want to put a bullet in my head every time I hear it. I will stand in the corner bc that’s the only place you can’t hear it while I’m waiting to join a game.

developer_response.body: Thanks for the review, I will take a look at adding something to isolate the lobby music. It can be adjusted with the ambient audio settings, however I can understand how the can also be wanted during gameplay

reviews.review_description: Would be great if you could level up in private rooms with friends. The fact that you reach lvl 50 and are one shot buy players that have gotten to above 80 and telling you to play better or leave is a joke. Otherwise fun gam.

developer_response.body: Thanks for the review! Adding XP to private matches is high on our agenda and we hope to have it done in the next couple of updates.

reviews.review_title: The best FPS available on any platform!
reviews.review_description:
COD is a poor imitation of this game!

New Kill Confirm mode 

MOD maps, 14 available at the point of writing this including a Space Station, WW1 Trench, Nuke Town to name a few.

Cross platform with Steam, Pico, PSVR1, PSVR2

I have access to all the other FPS's on PCVR, but I find myself coming back to Alvo again and again.

This game is fast paced fun, and the community is so friendly. 

The Devs are very active in the community, I talk to them regularly.

The game also has Bhaptic support.

Look, game looks nice, and maybe I’m just bad at it, but what the hell is the damage in this game? I load into my very first game and instant just die, cool whatever, but every time I’d shot someone, I’d just die in a millisecond, no damage indicated where it’s coming from, at least from what i experienced, then when I shoot someone, it takes a legit half a mag to kill them when it seems like it only takes them 3 bullets. Fun game and concept, but not recommended if you get angry easily. I give a fair 3/5 stars for fun level, but damage needs worked like crazy.

I'm still new to the game and have a lot to learn.
It is fun, I like that you can choose auto reload.
The maps need some work as they do feel a bit small, I think you can only have 5 players on the map playing free for all online.

I hope they continue to develop the game and add stuff. 

Not into zombies so not tried that feature. 

It's worth having in your library of games for sure.
The game Is aight Is fast

reviews.review_title: Best cod style VR Game, a must buy 🤩
reviews.review_description:
I've been playing for over a year now, and I have to say I have never experienced a game like alvo, fast paced with kill streaks, perks etc 🤩 team modes and Zombies 🔥 amazing community with people who genuinely want to help new people get into the game 💯 

The devs are working non stop to provide us with kore guns, skins, maps and constant updates to improve the game 🔥 

I have the honour of testing on both quest and Psvr2 and all I can say with the quest 3 out soon there are amazing things to come for alvo 💯🔥🔥 a must buy for me on any platform you won't regret it. 

Best advice, ask advice whenever you can and build up your skills 🔥 hope to see you on the field 🤩🔥

More huge updates including community made maps that have been successful,  also a new game mode on its way very very soon. Keep it up guys amazing work 🫶

The game was kind of a let down. The controls were the worst controls of all time. They made me want to commit suicide. I swear the controls were so aids. And there are a bunch of sweats. This game NEEDS a control update

developer_response.body: Thanks for the review. If you are able to send some feedback on what ways you would update the controls, please send to sean@alvogame.com

reviews.review_title: bro this is literally made for console
reviews.review_description: bro if you look at the tutorial it's so constantly it's like they just didn't even try to work on it they just ported it to vr it also just looks like a remake of call of duty or a copy no one plays the zombies does not work do not buy this game

developer_response.body:
Thanks for the feedback, I agree the tutorial needs a makeover, honestly It could be added as part of the main lobby now (Originally the lobby was a static menu so this wasn't possible). What issues are you having with zombies? Please drop me an email to let me know so that it can be looked into, I can't see any played game stats from your account to cross reference.  sean@alvogame.com

Thanks

Sean

reviews.review_title: Best FPS on VR! So much Potential!!
reviews.review_description: Perfectly executed mechanics I can't wait to see what else is added! I will say I would love it if there were more options when setting up private games like being able to play with a friend against 10 bots on Hard point and just the same kind of stuff you could do on cod back in the day and presumably still

developer_response.body: Thanks for the review, some great feedback! More options in private matches is a good idea. Regards Sean

reviews.review_description:
I own all other shooters on Quest3 but Alvo among the top 3 best.  Alvo progression system makes the game very addictive. Maps are created with imagination and are very vertical.

P.S. Please bring back option to play with bots even with 4 players as now it seems empty without bots when 4 players join. It was way better as it was before.

reviews.review_title: I have had this game for over 3 years
reviews.review_description: This used to be one of my most played games until a few months ago when ai bots took over fix the game
Top shooting game .. WATCH OUT FOR “THE CHAD” and  “SPEEDY”…must have
The maps are too small.. good game tho

developer_response.body: It's something we keep circling back to, the larger maps like desert and industrial seem to be the least played. There are some great maps being added in the community maps section. In the future we would like to enable XP to be earned in these maps too.

reviews.review_description:
Used to love this game when I first got it..  stopped playing for a while,  then picked it up again today, tried to play survival but no matter which area I picked it shoved me into the metro. Also had private room picked, but randos wandered in anyway. WHY?! If it hadn't been so long,  I'd be demanding a refund.. fix your game!

Dropped to one star becauseI gifted the game to a friend yesterday thinking it was fixed, but it's STILL jacked up,  and devs can't be bothered to acknowledge the problem. Won't buy anything from this company again.

developer_response.body:
Hi Seth,
We've only just released the update to fix the issue in your initial post (was released 18th November at 12:00 UTC. Build 0.58)

Looking at the logs your last attempt to play was still on the old build 0.56.

If you do still come across any issues please get in touch sean@outsideinent.com

Regards

Sean

reviews.review_description:
Game is great ....except for you
 get to a certain level and can't self revive..keep everything the same just make improvements

developer_response.body: Thanks for the feedback, I will take a look into this. Regards Sean

reviews.review_description:
This is a great game
Graphics are good
Realistic buildings and weapons
And it is really fun!
Would love to have more guns and attachments and more custom paint and more outfits for you to pick from. That would be awesome too 😁

developer_response.body: Thank you for the feedback, definitely something that we want to update!

reviews.review_description:
Hey devs this is one of my favorite games. Love playing zombies with friends but only issue is Sometimes get blown up and put out of the map under the ground on metro and can't get back in. Then we lose all the progress we made. 

And would be great if there was a way to save the game so we don't have to start from the beginning every time.

developer_response.body: Hey, If you can drop me an email with locations that you get pushed through the map I will take a look at it, that definitely shouldn't happen. sean@outsideinent.com . Thanks Sean

reviews.review_description: the people are nice, guns are janky, it was FOURTY DOLLARS, good memorys with this game tough

developer_response.body: Thanks for the review! Please drop me an email and let me know where you were charged so much for a copy as we've always been half that. Regards Sean sean@gaming-synergy.co.uk

reviews.review_description: Super fast-paced action! Nonstop fun! I was never into first FPS games until this one! I love that it's easy to get into it, but it definitely takes time to get any good at it!  Well worth it though! The community of folks on this Game are really awesome, fun to play with & are always a challenge! I totally recommend this game to everyone! I wish they would make an Alvo 2 game & just add a ton more maps or maybe make an ALVO game that people could create their own maps on & share! 5 stars & I'm Out!

The game used to work pretty well. Now it's glitchie,  the servers are slow, there is a significant difference in the EU vs US servers and you get kicked out of games due to poor server connections 

Developers know the issues but would rather concentrate on  adding stupid little nuances like new uniforms to purchase instead of improving the actual game play.

At this point, many people have moved away from this game because of the game not working like it should. Spend your money elsewhere

developer_response.body: Hey DungBeattleFlungPoo, Hope you are finding more stability in the recent updates. Still monitoring to iron out anything else. Regards Sean

reviews.review_title: Wish the active player base was larger
reviews.review_description: I used to play this on PSVR. I'm now on Quest 3. It's a good game, and good maps. Just be nicer if there were more players. The developers have done an excellent job with this title.

reviews.review_title: Game is good. You no like? you no buy
reviews.review_description:
Still waiting for bear traps.....
                    



                    🏃‍♂️             🚓   🚓
I like it, it’s fast paced, and I’ve met a great bunch of people! X ❤️
THIS GAME IS SO CHEEKS BROTHER
Turn around every now and then I get a little bit

reviews.review_title: Worst COD clone I played so far on Quest
reviews.review_description:
I don’t know why this game exist.

AIM X is free and it’s about the same game .

Only 3 maps to play bots with. 

Only saw one person on multiplayer. 

Contractors does everything this game does but better.

To top it off it makes you listen to horrible music in the lobby and you can’t even turn it off in the settings. I tried . That was the last straw for me . Refund

I thoroughly enjoy playing Alvo and the maps are fun and interesting with enough action to hold your attention. My only criticism is that there are not really enough customisable options for the guns you can but when you reach the appropriate amount of kills using the previous gun.  

One or two maps (dojo and dessert) are a little small, and I found them a bit limiting, but maybe this issue can be addressed in a future update.  My favourite map is 'house' as there are plenty of nooks and crannies to hide while you reload, without getting shot to bits by other players or bots haha.

This game is well worth investing in and is one you will keep returning to time and time again.

Very good game for the money, I like how it plays and there’s plenty to keep you focused etc. I did buy some of the gun skins through cash coins that I bought in the META store but they won’t equip and come up with a locked symbol hence the 4 stars. Devs, can you please fix or explain this?

developer_response.body: Hey Erabus,  We did notice the issue with store items not equipping, this was fixed in the last patch. If you are still having issues please drop me an email. sean@outsideinent.com

reviews.review_description: This game is amazing !! From 4 load outs to deferent Maps,earn ranks, unlock weapons  ,fighting Zombies and group missions  or free kill for all ,send the dogs after your enemy or hunt them down with a drone ! This game has excellent  graphics, and it’s my to go to every day ! Thanx alvo creators for this epic game

I’ve played this game a fair amount, nice people and fun game. The PvP (player vs player) is very enjoyable but also the zombie mode. Wow. The special quests for skins and Easter eggs are amazing, really fun leveling system and just a blast of a game, for me as a zombie game lover this really hit the spot for me for a low price using  a referral code for 15% off!
You can use my referral code too! -
Just remove any spaces from this link for it to work.
htt ps :/ / www. meta. com/ap preferrals/Python_ gamer_1/6937410016334124 ?utm_source=oculus &utm_location=2&utm_parent =frl&utm_medium =app_ referral&utm_content =copy

reviews.review_title: One of the best zombie modes.
reviews.review_description: Love the game, so much fun. My friends and I play it daily and can spend a few hours in the zombie mode. The only downside is only 3 maps for the zombies, would love it if the Devs would add more but a load of fun.

reviews.review_title: Not bad but definitely not good,
reviews.review_description: The guns are plasticky and every server I joined was empty

reviews.review_title: One of the best games on Meta Quest
reviews.review_description: I’ve been waiting for this game for at least two years and it finally came out! This game is spot on as a first person shooter challenging but yet fun! There’s improvements and updates being done on the game, which makes it even better. It’s always fun to play with people in other parts of the world.
I've tried other shooting games,and find myself coming back to this game. It's fun and the community is pretty great.

I play this game daily. Though the
 game play is tricky at first. Stick with it as you gain experience, it just gets better and better. The players are some of the nicest, most helpful people your likely to meet anywhere virtually ❤️ love you guys!!!

just bought this game today and for some reason when i try to launch it it im stuck in the loading screen where it says "logging in" i waited for like 5 minutes and nothing happens help me fix this pls.

developer_response.body: Hey, If you are still experiencing issues drop me an email. sean@outsideinent.com

reviews.review_title: Greatest first person shooter on vr
reviews.review_description: By far the greatest gaming community ever. Wonderful game play, fast paced, on edge excitement. Competitive fun and I highly recommend anyone who loves shooter games to down load alvo
Game not enjoyable high level guns to op and you get one shot by them so not so enjoyable/Entertaining
The people in this game do not like anyone that is non-military. That's the gist of it. That is the way they are. Allowing Children in this game is appalling.

reviews.review_title: Not just a game, but a family!
reviews.review_description: Updating my review. I bought it when it first came to quest and gave it 5 stars. I wish I could change it to 100 stars.   I live in the middle of nowhere and have no friends IRL. Every other game base is too toxic to really make friends. Not Alvo! The community (which the devs are VERY active in)  has become my entire social life. All us seasoned veterans are happy to help new players. When you buy Alvo, you're not just buying a game. You're buying a family! Community aside, this is STILL the best VR shooter EVER. It's the closest you'll get to COD. The controls are a bit strange at first, but it's VERY accessible for those with disabilities or coming to VR from flat screen. Devs are CONSTANTLY updating the game and adding new features, maps, guns, etc. We even have a team based league now. Not only is this game worth every penny, but it actually SAVES you $ because you'll never want to buy another game again! It was great when it first came out,  but it just keeps getting better!
Takes forever to load and play a game and drops off whilst playing

I don't know what happened to the game from yesterday to today but for some reason I keep getting in lobbies with higher levels there needs to be a matchmaking it is ridiculous. I can't even enjoy the game no more. I want to be in a Lobby that is at least my level I don't want to be in lobbies when people are over a hundred and something level it makes the game difficult and I don't even want to play it anymore because of it I would like my money back.

developer_response.body:
The low rank matchmaking option is only available for players under rank 50. Once you go over this the level cap is lifted.

If you are under rank 50 and still experiencing this, please send me an email. sean@outsideinent.com

Regards

Sean

reviews.review_title: The best Shooter, like Counter Strike
reviews.review_description: Excellent game. Fast paced gameplay. Currently my most played game. No need to wait for long like in the Population One, where you spend long time waiting at the beginning and then at the end till someone wins. In Team Play, in SND (Search and Destroy), you can play like in Counter Strike...

reviews.review_title: A dumpster fire of a game
reviews.review_description:
Mechanics of the game always glitch out and is just purely unenjoyable 
And I can’t even refund it because I left my oculus just droning on so I’m stuck with this, waste of money, sorry devs but this could’ve been better. SMH

developer_response.body:
Hey Alexz1107,

If you can drop me an email with issues you have I would like to take a look.

sean@outsideinent.com

Regards
Sean

reviews.review_description: When getting into a game and placed with people of mixed ranks it seems like one team is stacked while the other is made up of lower ranked people. This makes some rounds hard to enjoy, and it would be better if the teams could be evened out.

reviews.review_title: Be fun if I could play it!
reviews.review_description: Every time I launch this app it says I dont have internet connection so it cant reach the games servers. My internet signal is Excellent so I dont know why it kerps saying that. I am going to try the update on ot and see if that fixes the issue. If it does, I will come back and give a real review!

developer_response.body: Hey zomboZombos, drop me an email at sean@outsideinent.com if you are still having issues

reviews.review_description: If you can get past the impoverished racist children with childhood trauma in the chat, it’s a pretty good game, the mute button is your best friend in multiplayer on this game, the fact that it’s cheap is what attracts a lot of undesirables

developer_response.body:
Thanks for leaving a review. Sorry to hear that you've had an issue with players in game. As you mentioned we do have a mute feature and a reporting system which we monitor. Please give some feedback on the game itself too as your rating seems based purely on the players you met.

Regards

Sean

reviews.review_description: Game will not install. Anyone else having this problem?

Bought this game at full price, hoping for a virtual reality rendition of Black ops zombies, instead I get a looping start up screen. Even after half an hour of letting the game run through this cycle, it was still fruitless. Uninstalled the game three times to try and make those 15 bucks worth something. Biggest waste of money ever. Before you buy this total load, make sure you have terabyte internet. If not, make sure that the headset is touching your router at all times so it has the slightest chance of connection.

developer_response.body: Hey MidnightMarauder_, I've just tried contacting via DM but unable to due to privacy settings i'm unable. Your internet speed wont affect ability to connect to any systems, a very very high ping could affect but I've not heard of it. Looking at the logs I can see your multiple attempts to login. You mentioned that you have re-installed the app a few times, have you tried doing a router restart? It is possible that there could be a blocked port that is used by the game. If you want to get in touch to get this sorted please send me an email. sean@outsideinent.com  Regards Sean

reviews.review_description: Love this game and community! After playing Pavlor, contractors, gun raiders etc I finally found the game I was looking for!! This game is fast paced fun!!! Community is the best around and gameplay is outstanding! I just hate the dogs 😂. The slide ability makes this game stand out! Loving it!

Controls are terrible, no recoil for the guns, the reloading is ridiculous, and nothing but annoying young kids play that constantly scream the entire match.  Just play Contractors or Onward, they actually tried to develop good games

developer_response.body:
Please check out the current version of the game. Based on reviews we have made a lot of changes; proper manual reload being one of the biggest.  If you like the changes, please let us know in an updated review.

Our latest update included an overhaul of our manual reload system.  We think players who appreciate more realistic reloading mechanics will find it much better than our previous reload options.

Mags can be removed by gripping with offhand or pressing a button to eject them. Grab mag and insert via grip. If a bullet is not in the chamber, the gun will then need to be charged as you would expect with off hand trigger button and manual input combo. 

Tactical Reloads are now possible.   There is an option to hold off hand grip to keep hand on gun, or press to grab, press to release.   You can enable the manual reload in the new tutorial, or in the options menu via game options, turn off “full auto reload”
The new system is responsive and quick, we hope you like it.

For new players we have added the options of rank-based matchmaking and made the initial progression system quicker to unlock new items.

Additionally we have added 
-Crossplay with PlayStation VR
-Hardpoint game mode
-Multiple new maps.

reviews.review_description: The controls are wacky and the health is so low and the guns your hand is stuck to it I regret buying this I want a refund

reviews.review_description: My favorite game. Everyone is awesome. play everynight.

I would 100% recommended this Fps to anyone who loves fast paced and intense gameplay ,including a wide variety of weapons,perks and score streaks 🤯. if you have any thoughts or concerns or want to talk to the alvo community jump over to their discord , it’s a very friendly and welcoming environment and the devs are very active with there players 😀 10/10 from me to you, try it out you won’t be sorry .

I bought the game based on reviews saying that it was better than both onward and contractors. Crazy take, I played about 1 minute against the bots and it is literally no where close to as good as either games. Mechanics are garbage, arcade games have better gameplay. Pales in comparison to contractors. Would give it zero stars if possible. Will be returning immediately.

reviews.review_description: This game is pretty cool just bought it but one thing they should add is turning off auto reload

developer_response.body: Thanks for leaving a review!  Changes coming with reload options.

reviews.review_description: I have purchased 5 copies of the game to date. This is my favorite virtual reality game.  I have about 150 other virtual reality games that I barely ever play because I love this game so much.  I apologize in advance for my obscene laughing.

developer_response.body: Thanks for all your support Jason!   Nice playing with you.

reviews.review_description: This is the best first person shooter game in VR hands down. I’ve loved playing it on PSVR and now I’m excited to play it on the Quest. Really loving the new dual wield option!! Would definitely recommend for anyone looking for a fast paced game where you can talk to other players.

This game feels like Call of Duty VR. However some of the maps are too big for a small player lobby, I’d recommend some smaller maps like a Nuke Town map. Some more gamemodes would be nice too and maybe a map maker.

reviews.review_title: Is the best reference of Call of Duty
reviews.review_description: Very very good game good looking graphics I really have nothing to say about this game because it is good Game

reviews.review_title: The game that changed my mind!!!
reviews.review_description:
I have tried most of the shooters and was loosing hope… then I saw vrbrosgaming  playing this game… it’s an amazing pace … even better community … close to cod gameplay … addictive… definitely has helped my depression!!!  Get the game bro it’s hours of fun…. Close to the shooters i grew up with 
Thank you for making this game! 
I don’t even play the classics anymore 
because it’s so addictive !

reviews.review_title: Amazing game MUST BUY FOR ANY COD FANS..
reviews.review_description:
Great multiplayer fps creates the feeling of good old bo1 days with a little csgo mixed in honestly can't believe how addictive the game is. The community is also one of the nicest I've ever seen in this type of game literally made a new friend on Alvo today and we played 5 hour straight and yet we live in different countries the cross platform is amazing too .

Zombie mode is similar to cod zombies in the way that you purchase guns of the wall. I do hope one day it will become more like cod zombies with the purchasing of doors to progress as having full access to the map takes a bit of the difficulty away and adding a pack a punch system and or pearks ( jug, ) and all. Those are the only negatives otherwise this game is phenomenal and deserves all the love it gets I recommend joining there discord as the community really shines in both game and chat.

To the devs. Well done you have made a game that brings me great joy and I can never thank you guys enough I will always have this as my go to fps in vr as you guys 10000% know how to make a great game 👍

I've played four or five different shooters on the Quest so far since I made the purchase in January.   Pavlov is cool.  Population one is really fun and works great.  Contractors just feels right!  But this?!   Do you remember the old arena shooters like Unreal Tournament back in the day?  Think of the speed and chaos of that, but the gun handling and just overall fun of Call of Duty it's PRIME.  That's Alvo!   Being able to easily see level progressions, unlocks of attachments and new guns at the end of a match is so good.  They don't make you click through a bunch of pages. It's just laid out really simple on a single page at the end of a match which is great.  They really make you work for the unlocks and it forces you to get better at the game and learn the control scheme.  The controls are a bit different than other shooters on Quest.  The reloading is different for example.  You still have to grab the clip from your side but there is no pulling a clip out of the gun yourself or anything like that. Once you grab the clip from your side you just put it near the weapon and it animates itself.  The developers have already addressed that people want the ability to reload faster if they are skilled enough themselves to do it manually.  They listen!  Maps are fun and I'm excited to see what other types of terrain they are going to throw at us!  They allow you to jump on top of things that maybe you typically couldn't on some games, so there's a lot of verticality on certain maps, which I love. Oh,  and this is the first game that I have played in VR that has killstreaks!   It even has attack dogs that actually work impressively well!  I like to run with them because they sniff out the enemies and if I happen to go down, they continue to run around the map taking people out for a while!   Don't worry, you can shoot them! 

I can go on and on about how fun this is, but why would you want to keep reading that. Go try it yourself!
Keep updating and this might be the best shooter  add more killstreaks perhaps a  prestige leveling system more guns and it will be the perfect shooter ever

developer_response.body:
Thanks gothicking97 for taking the time to review Alvo. We have had several updates over the past few months. We have added 3 new maps since launch Retreat, Factory, and Desert. We are currently working on new grenade types and a few other pieces of equipment. Crossplay is our main focus at the moment. We do plan to add more killstreaks and guns as well. Prestige is a suggestion we get and may add in the future. 
Please join us on discord to stay up to date on the latest info about updates and features and to help us shape the future of Alvo. https://discord.com/invite/p8F9rAVPnP
Also if you can fill out a survey this will help us prioritize new features and based on suggestions which features to add or tweak. https://3ep03fxgyup.typeform.com/to/dnk9EdIO

reviews.review_description: Great in game mechanics with a fun play style. TDM is my favorite so far, but I look forward to seeing what else the devs release in the future! Keep up the excellent work

developer_response.body: We are looking forward to future updates as well, thanks for the review!

reviews.review_title: Controls feel so easy. Like it..
reviews.review_description: First i buy contractors. For me to hard to handle as a new player on VR. This game when i buy i play from te first few games i was directly sold. If i show vr to friends never play vr, they also join and play it like that. Use to call of duty this is the game to buy. Easy reload systhem is till now the best i have had. Duall guns are lot of fun. And if there are botts, fun to make kills for unlock upgrade's also. 5 stars for me.. (my english is not good, i know. I dont ride revieuws normaly. Bud this time i do)

The guns feel weird and not really like their in my hands. You can't really reload manually, which is what I wanted and its just pressing a button. The pump guns also feel unreal, like Im just holding a stick that goes boom when I press a button, not something you have to actually pump, and then fire. The game modes are ok, and the players are quite toxic. Overall a pretty meh game. I had a better experience with Pavlov shack. Edit: I'm sorry, my review was a bit harsh. The game is great, I just had a bad experience. I tried it again and had fun, I'm sorry for judging too early

developer_response.body:
Thanks for leaving a review.
Re reloading:  Currently you can use motion reload or full auto.   "Full auto" is the button press and "motion" is more the hybrid which combines a movement and an animation.   We are assuming you tried both and neither are ti your satisfaction, we are working on a third option for players who want more steps involved in the reload.

Sorry to hear you found the community toxic, thats def not the norm as most of our players our very eager to help new players. The community has been one of our biggest strengths going all the way back to our Playstation VR Beta.

We hope you will give the game a try again and check back after future updates.   Please join the discord if you would like to provide feedback directly with the dev team. 
https://discord.gg/p8F9rAVPnP

Edit: Thanks for jumping back in and giving it a second look + updating your rating/review.  Glad to hear your are enjoying the game!

reviews.review_description: I have to say it loud alvo is very fun very very entertaining I see the future of also growing strong in vr world a lil kinks but it's fair to say it's awesome what an introduction to vr it's my first experience  👍🏿
This game is fun I like to play it with my cousin 😜😜😜😜
Love the people and the interactions with the community. Also love how playing the top players it doesn’t feel like you are stuck dying over and over again. 5/5 game for a VR shooter.

developer_response.body: Thanks for the review BennyBoy2203!  Key when facing those top players-find a good camping spot lol.

reviews.review_description: I never played a game like this one before, I love the vr look and the people I play with are really genuine people which is one of the other reasons why I love this game. I give it 10 stars😁
It’s the best game ever

If you’re looking for a solid and friendly community take a look here. I would definitely recommend this game as the maps/levels are awesome - can have them day or night, and a numerous assortment of game play styles. Getting higher in rank may seem like a challenge but be social and you’ll get what you need. Strongly recommended for new users. - DirtNasty1977

reviews.review_title: Best shooter VR game I own
reviews.review_description: I've played Pavlov, onward and a few others but this is easily the best. The movement is very smooth and I havent gotten motion sick at all. The zombies more is extremely fun, and the perk system and weapon progression really adds a reason to play. The community is very helpful and I honestly haven't played a game and not had fun.

reviews.review_title: The VR FPS you have been looking for
reviews.review_description: If you're looking for a fast paced Run and Gun you've come to the right place. It can be challenging to get the hang of the locomotion at first but it brings options that other titles just don't have. The levels are pleasing to the eye and offer many play style options and elevations, blind spots, bottlenecks and cover found throughout the environment keep things moving. It's a little bit of work to unlock new weapons and perks but it's rewarding when you find your weapon. The weapons handle really well and you'll eventually find you have a second nature  on the draw as you set your sites on your next target. Matches are aggressive and adrenaline packed. Spawn quickly for revenge or wait for distance if you find yourself getting gunned down at spawns. It happens to all of us if it's a full house of 10. If you like to squad up with your pals there are 5v5 TDM and Bomb/Base defenses. If your looking for a co-op PVE challenge Zombies will keep you and your crew busy with plenty of jump scares and tension as you scramble to reload or fight back waves to save a friend. The community is friendly and helpful. The dev's are active and engaged with this labor of love and you might just catch them in a match yourself. Don't take my word for it check out their discord talk to the players. See you on the battle field.
